title: Proceeding proposals
description: Incoming proposals for sports-court proceedings. Open a proceeding (the VSK is notified by email) or reject the proposal.

openDialog.title: Open proceeding?
openDialog.content: Opening the proceeding will notify the VSK by email. Continue?

rejectDialog.title: Reject proposal?
rejectDialog.content: Warning: Rejecting will permanently and irrevocably discard all documents uploaded for this proposal. This step cannot be undone. Really reject?

notifications.loadError: Proceeding proposals could not be loaded.
notifications.opened: Proceeding opened, the VSK has been notified.
notifications.rejected: Proposal rejected, the documents have been discarded.
